name: Thri-kreen
description: Monstrosity. Medium. Thri-kreen are insectoid nomads with secondary arms and a chitinous shell. Thri-kreen Anatomy: you cannot wear items fitted for humanoids such as armor, bracers, cloaks, or rings; you understand humanoid languages but cannot speak them; your secondary arms can stow or retrieve items freely each turn but cannot wield weapons or shields; your natural armor is 13 + Dexterity modifier; you cannot wear armor but may carry a shield. Natural Weapons: you are proficient with your claws and bite. Claws and Bite: when you take the Attack action, you can replace one attack with a claw or bite attack dealing 1d4 + Strength modifier damage, increasing by 1d4 at character levels 5, 11, and 17. Beginning at 5th level, your bite can inject venom a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus per Long Rest; the target must save against Poisoned, then possibly Paralyzed after 1 minute if still affected. Leap: at 3rd level, you can leap 50 feet forward or 20 feet straight up from a standing position, but not backward. Desert Adapted: you need only 1 gallon of water per week, cannot swim, and do not gain exhaustion from a forced march. Sleepless: you do not need to sleep, magic can't put you to sleep, and 4 hours of light activity provide adequate rest.
